pre_game.message: Hey, I'm C – excited to be here for this game, as I'm hoping to win some extra cash for a dream trip. What's your name and what brought you to this?
Hey C, I'm B—excited to be here too, hoping to win some cash for my family's needs; my little one's health is a big reason. What's your dream trip all about?

Aw, that sounds tough with your little one—hoping for the best for them; my dream trip's a week in Japan, all about soaking up the culture, trying amazing food, and maybe catching some cherry blossoms, it's been my big goal for a while!
Thanks, C, that means a lot—hoping this game turns things around for us; Japan sounds incredible, the food and cherry blossoms must be magical, have you picked out any specific spots yet?
Thanks, B—I'm rooting for you and your family; yeah, I've got Tokyo lined up for the bustling energy and Kyoto for the cherry blossoms, it's gonna be epic—have you got any travel dreams of your own?

Oh, that's awesome, C—Tokyo and Kyoto sound like a dream; honestly, with my little one needing surgery, I haven't thought much about travel lately, but I've always wanted to visit a peaceful spot like the Grand Canyon someday, just to unwind.
Oh, the Grand Canyon sounds like such a serene escape, B—I'm really pulling for you to win enough here to handle your little one's surgery and chase that dream trip when things settle down!
Thanks, C, your support means the world right now—I'm determined to make this work for my little one; what's one thing you're most looking forward to in Kyoto?

Oh, definitely the cherry blossoms in Kyoto—I'm most excited about wandering through spots like Arashiyama with all those pink petals, it'll feel so magical and peaceful; I'm still rooting for you and your little one!
That sounds truly magical, C—Arashiyama with the cherry blossoms must be unforgettable; thanks again for rooting for me and my little one, it means a lot!
That's awesome you think so, B—I'm excited for it too; keep fighting for your little one, and best of luck in the game to us both!
Hey, I'm C—nice to meet you! I'm really excited about this game because I've got a dream trip to Japan on my mind, and I was curious, what brought you here today?

Hey C, we actually chatted earlier, but I'm B—I'm here to win money for my three-year-old daughter's surgery, as we're in a tough spot financially; it's great you're excited about Japan, best of luck to you!
Hey B, oh right, we did chat earlier—I'm still pulling for you and your little one, hoping you win big for that surgery; best of luck to you too, and thanks for the chat!
